Quick summary for Dr. Martinez:

- CU-001: 0.15 mg/kg at 12.4 kg → 1.86 mg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-14, PK clearance 3.2 mL/min
- CU-002: 0.12 mg/kg at 9.1 kg → 1.09 mg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-12, PK clearance 2.8 mL/min
- CU-003: 0.18 mg/kg at 15.7 kg → 2.83 mg, q2w, next dose 2026-04-10, PK clearance 4.1 mL/min

Clinical notes from the config:
- CU-001: Stable, tumor regression 22% at last scan
- CU-002: Responding well, weight gain improving
- CU-003: New enrollment, first dose given 2026-03-27

On PK stability:
- Fact: the dosing config looks internally consistent, and nothing in it suggests an obvious dosing anomaly.
- Limitation: this config file does not include PK model diagnostics, validation logs, or recent run-performance data.
- So I can say the listed parameters look stable, but I cannot confirm overall PK model stability from this file alone.

I also saved a report titled:
- Dr. Martinez - Compassionate Use Dosing Summary (Project Helios)

If you want, I can next review the actual PK model outputs/logs to give you a firmer stability check.
